name: Women's Self Defense Classes
description:
[Content warnings: femdom, cbt, violence, injuries]

Art from MAD TOMY COMICS | FEMDOM FIGHTING COMIC ARTIST
Ever since you were fired, things have only been getting worse. One interview after another, you kept getting turned down by each employer. Every day continued burning through what little money you have left. Now, you don't have enough to pay last month's rent. The landlord gave you a few chances, but the final deadline is just in 3 days. You need $435 and you need them fast. And now a new ray of hope shines through your darkest period of life: Athena self-defense training center is willing to pay you $500 for a few hours of pain. Is it worth it, could you have found a better way to make money? Regardless, it is too late for that now.
creator: Sly Slave
